blocks.content: At home he sat on the edge of his bed. Blue button-down still on. Lights off.
She'd leaned in too. He knew she had.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I was standing ten feet away.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I know the song ended at a very inconvenient time.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: So then what are you doing.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Kit. Say the thing. Just say it.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: You've been not saying it since we were twelve —
He hung up. Sat in the dark. Eli wasn't wrong. He just wasn't ready. He kept thinking he'd know when he was ready.
